title: The Death of Muslim b. ligbah and the Bombardment and Burning of the Ka'bah / Zzz The Cause of the Burning of the Ka'bah
description: The Death of Muslim b. ligbah and the Bombardment and Burning of the Ka'bah / Zzz The Cause of the Burning of the Ka'bah. Recorded under the year 63 AH (683–684 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 19.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 19
